programme.desc: Due to Wak Tarjo's accident, the villagers work together to clean the big drain. Omar also starts his own business to compete with his father. Meanwhile, Helmi causes another accident in the village.

programme.title: Banjir Raya - EP 4
programme.desc: The villagers work hard to get ready for Raya even though the water levels are rising. Harianto insists on bringing Helmi back to his flat after another problem arises. On the night of Raya, Ghazali did not return home.

programme.title: Banjir Raya - EP 5
programme.desc: The heavy rain has fallen and many places have been flooded. The villagers are forced to flee to a safer place. However, they worry if their homes will be safe while trying to find their missing family members.

programme.title: Marhaban Ya Ramadan - EP 1
programme.desc: Two weeks before Ramadan starts, Ratna and Farah attend a relatives wedding and bump into an old ex-university mate, Stanley, who is now a Muslim convert. Around the same time, both are asked to lead teams to help fund raise at Ustaz Umars' Insan for a Ramadan project. This year also marks the first Ramadan since the death of the cousins grandmother. Farah's mother, Maria, reminds her siblings to continue with their late mum's family traditions.

programme.title: Marhaban Ya Ramadan - EP 2
programme.desc: Abdullah (Stanley) invites Ratna and Farah to join a weekend online religious class. Maria notices Mardiana is distracted and reminds her to not to be too preoccupied with trivial stuff and instead stay focussed on Ramadan. Maria resolves to stay away from social media for one month. At Insan, Ratna decides to 'take charge' and her behaviour is not welcomed by Farah.

programme.title: Upin & Ipin S9 - EP 6
programme.desc: In the 9th season of Upin and Ipin, the boys are excited to play with Tok Dalang's little chicks. They learn about different kinds of books as their homework and overcoming the dengue fever spread over Kampung Durian Runtuh.

programme.title: Dapur Vaganza - EP 18
programme.desc: Join the stars of Gegar Vaganza as they light up the kitchen, cooking, entertaining and getting ready for Ramadan while sharing laughter and stories with host Kak Lina and Tok Ram.

programme.title: JMJ Magika Raya
programme.desc: JMJ Magika Raya follows Ayla on a magical journey exploring heritage and the spirit of Hari Raya. One day, Ayla quarrels with her mum and falls asleep while clutching a folklore book. In a dreamlike world, she meets legendary Malay icons such as Hang Nadim, Radin Mas and Badang. Through these encounters, Ayla learns that the true spirit of Raya lies in forgiveness, gratitude, love and togetherness.

programme.title: Sinar Lebaran 2026
programme.desc: Sinar Lebaran 2026 is a festive homecoming like no other—uniting an orchestral experience with laugh-out-loud Raya skits, as beloved homegrown stars return to honour their roots. Anchored by Hafidz Rahman, Zuhairi Idris, Farhana M Noor, this edition welcomes a pulang kampung line-up featuring the legendary M. Nasir. A tribute to heritage, love and belonging—reminding us that wherever life takes us,HOME is where the ketupat is!

programme.title: Ubi Superstar Raya
programme.desc: Get ready for a Raya celebration like no other with Ubi Superstar Raya! Packed with hilarious sketches, catchy musical parodies and plenty of festive cheer. This comedy stage special brings together the funniest highlights of Ubi for non-stop laughs.

programme.title: Zaman Sekolah S4 - EP 9
programme.desc: "Zaman Sekolah" is a nostalgic journey back to the cherished days of schooling, where life-long memories and foundations were built. Each episode dives deep into the heart of what school life meant for our celebrity guests who return to their alma maters to relive and share their most poignant and formative experiences.

programme.title: Saat Hilang Tong Gas Mu
programme.desc: Azal works tirelessly, driving trucks during the day and selling bundles online at night after Azrina's parent request a dowry of RM20,000 for their marriage. When his lorry is stolen, he manages to recover it, but discovers that 200 gas cylinders worth RM20,000 are missing. With the wedding just a month away, Azal must find the money or risk losing Azrina.

programme.title: Upin & Ipin S9 - EP 6

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Al Raya - EP 1
programme.desc: Jep, Rahim, Pak Ya & Ebby Yus will enliven your Raya celebration with funny & entertaining skits. Watch the appearance of guest celebrities such as Ummi Nazeera, Eja, Lisdawati, Qasrina and many more.

programme.title: Mimpi Raya
programme.desc: Muaz and Faiz, competitive cousins in their mid-20s, rarely see eye to eye. When their grandmother, Nek Mah, needs help preparing dishes for Hari Raya, both eagerly volunteer - not out of love for cooking, but to impress her stunning neighbor, Aliza. Neither has cooking experience, but they see this as their chance to win her attention. programme.desc: Eid is a seamstress who aims to continue her late grandmother's legacy. She struggles to earn the trust of her grandmother's customers and has a hard time to find new clients as more people are buying online and no longer appreciate traditional hand-sewn details. As Hari Raya approaches, Eid, struggles to finish the orders. In addition, she has to restore her reputation that is ruined by an unhappy customer's viral video.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO Anyway Back Massage Cushion
programme.desc: A lightweight 4.5 kg cushion that turns any seat into a personal massage chair. Dual rollers on a full-length track relax from neck to hips and improve circulation. Simple controls make instant relaxation easy anytime, anywhere. 仅重 4.5 公斤，轻巧便携，椅子、沙发或车里都能用，一靠即可全背按摩。双滚轮从颈肩到腰臀，舒缓肌肉、促进循环。靠垫柔软贴合、支撑力佳、透气舒适，随时轻松放松。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - i-Running TM-299 Foldable Treadmill
programme.desc: Compact, slim, and ready to use straight out of the box. Walk or jog anytime with quiet operation, shock absorption for joint comfort, and adjustable speed and incline. Fold it flat for easy storage—your convenient home fitness solution. 轻巧省空间，开箱即用。安静运行、减震护膝，可调速度与坡度，适合快走与慢跑。折叠后薄至12公分，轻松收纳床底或靠墙摆放，让居家运动更轻松自在。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Collagen Diamond Pro
programme.desc: Kinohimitsu’s newly upgraded Collagen Diamond Pro combines 5,500mg of marine collagen peptides with NMN, Resveratrol, and Astaxanthin to rejuvenate your skin from within. It helps reduce fine lines and wrinkles, evens out dullness and pigmentation, and boosts elasticity and hydration—leaving skin firmer, smoother, and radiant. Kinohimitsu全新升级的 Collagen Diamond Pro 胶原蛋白饮，融合5500毫克深海胶原胜肽与NMN、白藜芦醇及虾红素，从内而外激活年轻能量。有效淡化细纹皱纹，改善暗沉与色斑，全面提升肌肤弹性与保湿力，让肌肤更紧致、水润、透亮。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kyocera Ceramic Knife
programme.desc: Ultra-sharp, lightweight, and rust-proof—preserve food’s natural color and nutrients. Effortlessly cut fruits, vegetables, and boneless meat. Reinforced black blades stay sharp 10× longer than steel. Smooth surfaces make cleaning quick and easy, delivering precise, effortless cutting every time 体验日本匠心工艺——锋利轻巧、不生锈，保留食材原色和营养。轻松切水果、蔬菜和无骨肉类。强化黑刃版比钢刀锋利10倍更持久，光滑表面易清洗，精准切割，高效省力。

programme.title: Baby Einstein - Baby's First Sounds: Discoveries for Little Ears
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Hope and Faith - EP124
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn about the values of Faith and Hope. We will discover that hope is a value that allows us to believe that something positive will happen. programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Migration Menace - EP210
programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team fight to stop Nick Slick from harming migratory birds.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers S2 - Team Rainbow Rangers! / Wingin' It - EP215
programme.desc: The Rangers have to stop a factory from pouring rainbow colour in the river; the Rangers help a physically-challenged duckling fly, so it can catch up with its migrating flock.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Monster Smash / A Monster of a Mystery - EP108
programme.desc: When JD and Kent's battle bot, Monster Smash, escapes from the lab, the Secret Lab Kids must navigate a maze to find it. / When JD and Kent believe that the dreaded Whomper is lurking outside the lab, Kent is terrified. JD hopes to become famous for discovering an unknown creature. The team must use science to determine if it's really a monster or if they can correctly classify it as some other animal.

programme.title: Secret Millionaires Club - Just Say Snow! - EP116
programme.desc: The Secret Millionaires Club are on winter break where they find that the owner of Snowy Lodge named Jerry Crenshaw had retired and a new owner from Switzerland named Lucas has redecorated the hotel to make it feel like home. With no visitors to the lodge and no available part time jobs due to lack of visitors, Jones gets a job to be a poster boy for the lodge's advertisement and meets Lucas' son Phillipe who secretly doesn't know how to ski.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten - Hammy - EP103
programme.desc: Hammy, the new class pet and mascot, teaches the kids about taking care of a pet — and the kind of trouble a hungry super-powered hamster can cause!

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Attack of the 50 Foot Shaq - EP116
programme.desc: Shaq's friend, Keb, makes Shaq a special gift that's larger than life.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Zexal - Shark Attack - EP10
programme.desc: The story takes place in the distant future and focuses on a boy named Yuma Tsukumo, the number one bad boy at his school. Something unexpected happens when Ryoga challenges him to a Duel as the mysterious ghost of Astral appears before them, a new legend begins.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep10 - EP10
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Baby Einstein - Baby's First Sounds: Discoveries for Little Ears
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Hope and Faith - EP124
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn about the values of Faith and Hope. We will discover that hope is a value that allows us to believe that something positive will happen. Faith is having confidence in someone or something. When we have faith in people, we help them to believe in themselves. You must trust in yourself and know that you are capable of achieving it!

programme.title: Mellodees - Hickory Dickory Dock - EP12
programme.desc: Mini Dee explores the inner workings of a clock in this magical adventure.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep10 - EP110
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten - Super K's Vs The Fearsome Foursome - EP104
programme.desc: The Super K's meet their arch-nemeses, the Fearsome Foursome, and learn about the importance of perseverance.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Daredevil Gronk - EP117
programme.desc: The Shaq Paq helps Gronk get ready for the big debut with his daredevil hero, Cuckoo Carlos.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Zexal - The Pack: Part 1 - EP11
programme.desc: The story takes place in the distant future and focuses on a boy named Yuma Tsukumo, the number one bad boy at his school. Something unexpected happens when Ryoga challenges him to a Duel as the mysterious ghost of Astral appears before them, a new legend begins.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep6 - EP106
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein - Meet the Orchestra: First Instruments
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra™ -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Music Values - EP125
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that music helps us express our ideas and even our emotions. The rhythm, the melody, and harmony are the most important elements. Music can help us develop special skills such as: be persistent, be focused, it teaches us to communicate, share, and cooperate with other people. Music has the magic of uniting people because almost everyone shares a love for music!

programme.title: Mellodees - Humpty Dumpty - EP15
programme.desc: Dee and Lil Mello work their magic to put their guitar back together again.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep13 - EP113
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Pacific Palace - EP211
programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team fight to stop the illegal dumping of trash in the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers S2 - Whale of a Tale / Construction Destruction - EP216
programme.desc: Heavy boat traffic disrupts a migrating whale and her calf; the rangers must find a way to keep the whales safe.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Slime Time / It’s Always Sharkest - EP109
programme.desc: When JD uses Angie’s ‘oil slick dissolver’ formula for a slime fight, a wrong ingredient creates a gelatinous Blob monster that threatens to devour the city. / While visiting one of Kent’s relatives, the kids come up with a great idea for attracting more tourists to his restaurant - the only catch is that it also attracts a very big shark with very big teeth!

programme.title: Secret Millionaires Club - To Herring is Human - EP117
programme.desc: While in Stockholm, Sweden during the Herring Festival, the Secret Millionaires Club drums up business for a small herring eatery called Dahlquist's which is run by Isak Dahlquist's family. The Secret Millionaires Club discover that Dahlquist's faces stiff competition from a fast food restaurant called the Happy Herring which is owned by Arnie Sr. Meanwhile, Jones and Radley learns about Bandy from Isak as they learn how do Bandy against Arnie Jr.'s team.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten - Super K's Vs The Fearsome Foursome - EP104
programme.desc: The Super K's meet their arch-nemeses, the Fearsome Foursome, and learn about the importance of perseverance.

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock’ Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it’s not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Misha, the Purple Cat
programme.desc: Misha is a very lively, alert cat. She is very interested in investigating everything going on around her, which means she has some very entertaining adventures with her friends. Many things can happen in Misha’s world; especially exciting adventures, mysterious investigations, hilarious competitions... all with a feeling of close friendship.

programme.title: Music Box
programme.desc: Get ready to dance and sing-along to music-filled episodes

programme.title: LOL Block
programme.desc: A crazy collection of hilarious comedy series featuring shows like, Jelly Jam, Crazy Candies, Karim & Noor, and Talking Tom.

programme.title: Baby Riki
programme.desc: The show covers all aspects of a child’s life from physical well-being to cognitive and soft skills. The musical stories are based around age-appropriate experiences with educational concepts introduced in familiar surroundings and context for infants.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends Minis
programme.desc: Get ready to watch Talking Tom and Friends at their cutest! Mini in size, but massive in fun, the Minis check out the day-to-day world of the friends we all know and love where they do the most ordinary things in the most extraordinary ways.

programme.title: Leo the Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: Leo the Wildlife Ranger introduces the secrets and wonders of nature and wildlife around us and kickstarts a curiosity and passion for nature in kids. With engaging missions and adventures, kids have fun while learning positive lessons!

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Bino & Fino
programme.desc: Bino & Fino is about a brother and sister named Bino and Fino who live with their grandparents 'Mama' and 'Papa' in a modern day city in Africa. Bino and Fino have many adventures where, with the help of their friend Zeena the Magic Butterfly, they discover and learn things about the world.

programme.title: Horaci the Inuit
programme.desc: Packed with adventure, fun and excitement, HORACI THE INUIT will transport you to the Lands of the North where, together with his best friend Sedna, he will have to solve all kinds of mysteries! Horaci the Inuit takes place in a remote village and talks about universal values such as caring for nature, being intuitive and open-minded and, above all, having a loving respect for family and friends!

programme.title: Nutri Ventures
programme.desc: Protecting Healthy Foods At All Costs!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - At The North Pole
programme.desc: Bernard gets bored trekking across the frozen Arctic wastes. Some abandoned equipment becomes a source of great entertainment, but not for long.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Package
programme.desc: Zack tries to steal a parcel which Bernard is carrying. At first he succeeds, but Bernard doesn't give up that easily.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - Sleepwalker
programme.desc: Even when he's asleep, Bernard is capable of anything – as he finds out when he wakes up in the morning.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Pizza
programme.desc: Bernard

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Unicycle
programme.desc: To the amazement of Zack, Bernard discovers he has some performing skills which he never knew he had.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Motorboat
programme.desc: Although Bernard has been shipwrecked, his real problems begin when he finds an abandoned motorboat which could get him back to shore.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Prisoner
programme.desc: Bernard makes a daring escape from prison, but once he's out, he realises that perhaps life inside wasn't so bad after all.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Brain Candy TV
programme.desc: Early learning for a brighter future! Your children will love to learn their ABCs, numbers, colors and even some math and science with the help of our action-packed vehicles including monster trucks, dump trucks, trains and more, plus our cute dog Lizzy.

With the wedding just a month away, Azal must find the money or risk losing Azrina.

The Ginseng Bird’s Nest relieves fatigue, while the Red Date & Goji Berry version promotes a radiant complexion Kinohimitsu燕窝采用纯手工挑毛与古法炖煮，营养丰富，助美容养颜、增强体质、恢复活力。长白山人参燕窝饮补气强身、缓解疲劳；红枣枸杞燕窝饮促进气血循环，令肌肤红润透亮.

programme.desc: 14-in-1 La Gourmet pressure cooker that cooks food quickly using steam pressure La Gourmet glass air fryer cooks food by circulating hot air to produce crispy and healthier meals. 14 合 1 La Gourmet 高压锅使用蒸汽压力快速烹饪食物，La Gourmet 玻璃空气炸锅通过循环热空气烹煮出酥脆又健康的美食。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ASD Hybrid 3-ply Hex Wok 32 & 36cm
programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). ASD爱仕达316不锈钢不粘炒锅采用三层钢结构与耐高温不粘涂层，结合了不锈钢的耐用与不粘锅的便捷。蜂窝纹理设计省油防粘，食材加热均匀，不怕铁铲和钢丝球刮擦，适合烹饪各种坚硬食材。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - BRAND'S® Health-For-All Set
programme.desc: Healthy body, healthy life. Step it up with Brands! 生活过得好，身体健康最重要。阖家健康保健品，为你加油打气！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Yi Shi Yuan Tiger Milk Lung Cleanse
programme.desc: Developed by the Yi Si Yuan Medical Consultant Team, specially designed for respiratory health, strengthen immunity. It contains Tiger Milk Mushroom, Cordyceps, and Dendrobium Orchid, the exclusive formula helps maintain your lung's health, suitable for people with coughs, nasal allergies, recurrent colds. 忆思源虎乳芝净肺宝 由忆思源医药顾问团队专为维护呼吸系统健康、增强免疫力与日常保养而调配的独家配方。采用虎乳芝、冬虫夏草、石斛，三种珍贵药材；帮您先调理、后保健，有助于补肺气、维持肺部健康。适合咳嗽、鼻子过敏、反复感冒、长期曝露在空污环境的朋友服用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP20
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (20 out of 39)

programme.title: Sports Woman - Success - EP21

programme.title: Sports Woman - Glorious - EP22

programme.title: Baby Einstein - Meet the Orchestra: First Instruments
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra™ -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Music Values - EP125
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that music helps us express our ideas and even our emotions. The rhythm, the melody, and harmony are the most important elements. Music can help us develop special skills such as: be persistent, be focused, it teaches us to communicate, share, and cooperate with other people. Music has the magic of uniting people because almost everyone shares a love for music!

programme.title: Baby Einstein - Baby Bach: Musical Adventure
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach™ Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Manners when we travel - EP126
programme.desc: In this episode, Nova will take the viewers on a field trip through the different methods of travel. You should never leave your parents or the people you are travelling with! We will review some Planet Tools that will help us to make a calm trip inside the wagons of the train. The most important thing is not to reach the destination, but to enjoy the trip!

programme.desc: The show covers all aspects of a child’s life from physical well-being to cognitive and soft skills. The musical stories are based around age-appropriate experiences with educational concepts introduced in familiar surroundings and context for infants.

programme.desc: Get ready to watch Talking Tom and Friends at their cutest! Mini in size, but massive in fun, the Minis check out the day-to-day world of the friends we all know and love where they do the most ordinary things in the most extraordinary ways.

programme.title: Leo the Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: Leo the Wildlife Ranger introduces the secrets and wonders of nature and wildlife around us and kickstarts a curiosity and passion for nature in kids. With engaging missions and adventures, kids have fun while learning positive lessons!

programme.title: Counting With Paula

programme.desc: Bino & Fino is about a brother and sister named Bino and Fino who live with their grandparents 'Mama' and 'Papa' in a modern day city in Africa. Bino and Fino have many adventures where, with the help of their friend Zeena the Magic Butterfly, they discover and learn things about the world.

programme.title: Horaci the Inuit
programme.desc: Packed with adventure, fun and excitement, HORACI THE INUIT will transport you to the Lands of the North where, together with his best friend Sedna, he will have to solve all kinds of mysteries! Horaci the Inuit takes place in a remote village and talks about universal values such as caring for nature, being intuitive and open-minded and, above all, having a loving respect for family and friends!

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - At The North Pole
programme.desc: Bernard gets bored trekking across the frozen Arctic wastes. Some abandoned equipment becomes a source of great entertainment, but not for long.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Package
programme.desc: Zack tries to steal a parcel which Bernard is carrying. At first he succeeds, but Bernard doesn't give up that easily.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - Sleepwalker

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Unicycle

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Motorboat
programme.desc: Although Bernard has been shipwrecked, his real problems begin when he finds an abandoned motorboat which could get him back to shore.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Prisoner
programme.desc: Bernard makes a daring escape from prison, but once he's out, he realises that perhaps life inside wasn't so bad after all.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Brain Candy TV
programme.desc: Early learning for a brighter future! Your children will love to learn their ABCs, numbers, colors and even some math and science with the help of our action-packed vehicles including monster trucks, dump trucks, trains and more, plus our cute dog Lizzy.

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock’ Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it’s not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories

programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends; they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they're guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Box Yourself

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb’s eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!
